name: finance_wiki
description: 读写 Finance Ops 团队的 Notion workspace：'Finance Wiki' 和 '月度复盘' 两个顶级 database。用 finance-bot 这个 internal integration 的身份。

actions.name: create_page
actions.description: Create a new Notion page inside a database with properties + blocks

actions.name: append_blocks
actions.description: Append markdown content to an existing page

actions.name: query_database
actions.description: Query a database with filters and sorts

actions.name: update_page_properties
actions.description: Patch properties of an existing page

_demo_note: UniSpace demo does not actually write to Notion. Any create/append/update is logged and echoed back. In production this would use the Notion API with the integration secret.
